nl_query: Identify all scripts where the cached total marks on the answer script row differs from the total marks on the latest active evaluation attempt by more than 0.5 marks, indicating a cache synchronization issue.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id AS script_id, a.urn, a.student_id, a.student_cache.name AS student_name, a.total_marks AS cached_total, r.final_marks AS final_published_marks, (a.total_marks - r.final_marks) AS discrepancy
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = a.id
JOIN   result r ON r.script_id = a.id
WHERE  a.evaluation_status = 'ATTEMPTED'
  AND  a.is_active = TRUE
  AND  em.is_final = TRUE
  AND  (a.total_marks - r.final_marks) > 0.5
ORDER  BY discrepancy DESC
LIMIT  100;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): unaliased.name. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
